class.name: FmodAudioBus
class.brief_description: Represents an audio bus for mixing with effects support.
class.description: FmodAudioBus represents an audio mixing bus in the FMOD audio system. Each bus has its own channel group for routing audio, and can have multiple audio effects applied to it. Buses are organized in a hierarchy managed by [FmodAudioBusLayout]. The master bus is the root of this hierarchy, with all other buses ultimately routing through it. Use buses to: - Organize audio into logical categories (Music, SFX, Dialogue, etc.) - Apply effects to groups of sounds - Control volume and routing for entire audio categories - Implement solo/mute functionality for mixing

method.name: add_effect
method.description: Adds an audio effect to this bus at the specified [param index] in the effect chain. If [param index] is negative or exceeds the current effect count, the effect is appended to the end. The effect chain is processed in order, with each effect feeding into the next.

method.name: get_bus
method.description: Returns the [FmodChannelGroup] used by this bus for audio routing. Returns [code]null[/code] if the bus has not been initialized.

method.name: get_bus_name
method.description: Returns the name of this audio bus.

method.name: get_effect
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioEffect] at the specified [param index] in the effect chain. Returns [code]null[/code] if the index is out of bounds.

method.name: get_parent
method.description: Returns the parent [FmodChannelGroup] that this bus outputs to. Returns [code]null[/code] for the master bus.

method.name: get_volume_db
method.description: Returns the volume of this bus in decibels.

method.name: init_bus
method.description: Initializes this bus with the specified [param name] and optional [param parent] channel group. This creates the internal FMOD channel group for audio routing.

method.name: is_bypass
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if effects bypass is enabled for this bus. When bypassed, effects are not processed but the audio still passes through.

method.name: is_mute
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this bus is muted.

method.name: is_solo
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this bus is in solo mode. When any bus is soloed, only soloed buses produce audible output.

method.name: remove_effect
method.description: Removes the audio effect at the specified [param index] from this bus.

method.name: set_bypass
method.description: Enables or disables effects bypass for this bus. When [code]true[/code], effects are not processed.

method.name: set_mute
method.description: Sets the mute state of this bus. Muted buses produce no audible output.

method.name: set_parent
method.description: Sets the parent channel group that this bus outputs to.

method.name: set_solo
method.description: Sets the solo state of this bus. When any bus is soloed, only soloed buses are audible.

method.name: set_volume_db
method.description: Sets the volume of this bus in decibels. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB (unity gain).
